hypothesis: The direct v1 loop persists turn state, edit feedback, and the export family.
manipulation: Bootstrap blank graph, run one chat turn, apply edit feedback, export experiment.
measured_observable: turn persistence, active-set presence, membrane sanitation, retrieval of feedback, exported artifact family
confounds: bounded test harness rather than full live-user session; does not prove long-horizon generalization

hypothesis: Preview/commit/revert persists attributable measurement events and explicit rollback.
manipulation: Preview edge_add, commit, then revert committed event.
measured_observable: ledger delta, committed edge present after commit, absent after revert
confounds: server-side test plus export/log corroboration; no fresh Playwright rerun this turn

hypothesis: Hum refresh remains a bounded continuity artifact and does not leak into prompt assembly.
manipulation: Run chat turn, apply edit feedback, inspect hum payload and preview prompt.
measured_observable: hum payload counts rise while hum file paths stay absent from prompt assembly
confounds: bounded runtime path; does not prove all future hum variants stay injection-free without regression checks
